landing.hero: your CV is boring. let's fix that.
landing.subtitle: Drop your LinkedIn, paste a job offer, and I'll rewrite your entire CV to actually match what they're looking for. You're welcome.
landing.step3: Edit your CV and pick a tone
landing.ba_before_bullet: My goal is to provide the best experience for candidates and employees. We are remote first. We are building a great automation tool for enterprises.
landing.ba_after_bullet: Built People ops from scratch for a distributed team across 3 countries. Ran payroll in FR/US/UK with zero errors over 14 months. Cut onboarding time from 3 weeks to 5 days.
landing.footer: your CV deserved better. you're welcome.

upload.title: ok, show me what you got
upload.linkedin_drop: drop your LinkedIn PDF here — don't be shy
upload.linkedin_help_title: wait, how do I export my LinkedIn?
upload.offer_text_placeholder: or just paste the job description...
upload.step_analyzing: figuring out what matters... (~1 min, grab a coffee ☕)
upload.scrape_failed: couldn't read that URL — paste the job description below instead
upload.market_hint: adapts CV norms: education weight, language proficiency format, photo defaults

remembered.title: we remember you
remembered.subtitle: {{companies}} companies · {{facts}} facts from past CVs
remembered.hint: we'll reuse this so you don't repeat yourself. new answers override old ones.

tone.picker_title: Last step — which voice sounds like you?
tone.picker_hint: Same fact, three different voices. Pick the one you'd send.
tone.picker_error: Couldn't load samples — you can still set the tone later in the editor.

chat.title: they're looking for you, they just don't know it yet
chat.subtitle: I'm gonna ask you some questions. Be specific — numbers, names, results. I'll do the rest.
chat.error_generic: Something went wrong. Try again or start a new CV.
chat.recording_hint: recording... click stop when you're done
chat.start_over_confirm: Start a new CV? Your current progress will be lost.
chat.analyzing: Reading your profile and the offer...

templates.title: download
templates.subtitle: your CV is ready. pick the design, download the PDF, or share a public link.
templates.clean_desc: sidebar game strong. tech & data vibes.
templates.contrast_desc: dark header, big presence. leadership energy.
templates.timeline_desc: career as a vertical rail. chronological, clean.
templates.compact_desc: dense two-column. max content per page.
templates.share_auth_required: Sign in to share a public link

cover_letter.title: Cover Letter
cover_letter.subtitle: Tailored to the offer, based on your CV

editor.title: fine-tune it
editor.subtitle: click anything to edit. changes show up in real time on the right.
editor.audit_gated_tip: Fill contract type and company size on every experience first ({{count}} left)

projects.empty_hint: create your first CV to get started
